title: Designing Forecasting Workflows That Teams Actually Use
excerpt: Adoption is not just model accuracy. Here are practical patterns for planner-friendly forecast workflows.
content:
# Designing Forecasting Workflows That Teams Actually Use

The best model fails if planning teams cannot trust or use it.

## What helped most

- Keep feature pipelines transparent and versioned.
- Show error metrics in business terms (bias, service risk).
- Add planner feedback loops and measure closure rate.

## Outcome

A usable workflow increases trust and sustained adoption.

title: What I Learned Building Dashboards for Supply Leaders
excerpt: Clear, decision-oriented dashboards outperform overloaded BI pages every time.
content:
# What I Learned Building Dashboards for Supply Leaders

Dashboards are for decisions, not decoration.

## Principles

- One page per decision.
- Trend + root cause + action in the same view.
- Keep refresh and data lineage explicit.

When a dashboard maps to a weekly operating rhythm, usage improves naturally.
